## Project Info
This is a modern, responsive static website to showcase a game. It includes:
- Homepage with game description
- Features section
- Gallery with placeholder images
- Contact form
- Responsive design using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
- No backend or build tools required

## Next Steps

- Update text content as needed to reflect your game's details.
- Open index.html in your browser to preview the site.
